AI-assisted legal work isn’t a future trend. It’s happening now, and the firms like ours embracing it are able to punch above their weight. 9-figure deal. 48-hour deadline. A boutique team of senior attorneys at Acevedo Belt, P.A. , powered by Harvey. Brian Belt and Maria Acevedo built a firm that proves you don't need an army of associates to compete on the biggest deals. 

The result? 10–50% weekly time savings, and a major client won specifically because of their AI capabilities. 

"The number of billable bodies that a firm can throw at a deal no longer has to be a benchmark for measuring capability and capacity." — Brian Belt

: Why MCP
...
Databases are beginning to incorporate LLMs directly into or adjacent to the query planning layer, not to replace execution engines but to translate user intent into optimized, policy-aware query plans. This shifts the LLM from a “tool caller” role into an intent-to-plan compiler that operates closer to metadata, statistics, and constraints. Commonly called, "LLM-Augmented Query Engines".
...
Tech Positioning:
...
Viewed as an inevitable architectural evolution by data platform vendors and systems researchers, with cautious optimism. Most practitioners agree this is a long-term shift rather than a near-term replacement of classical optimizers.
...
References: 
Google BigQuery AI Functions, Snowflake Cortex, Databricks AI Functions, VLDB papers on learned query optimization, Andy Pavlo (CMU Database Group)
...

Great experience partnering with ISU students on this GenAI live case! Exciting to see their insights and creativity in action. As generative AI continues to transform both our professional and personal lives, how can we better prepare students to understand this powerful tool and its business implications? MidAmerican Energy Company , a partner for our Ivy Business Analytics & Digital Strategy Forum, brought this exciting live case to our Consultative Problem Solving (MIS/MKT 3670) class. Our students worked hard, dived into the details of GenAI, and most importantly, learned to appreciate the importance of electricity in our daily life! 

A special thank you to Vinay Kumar Kodiganti and Gabriel Ferreira for your time and commitment to our students' learning journey!

results.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer at Jobgether - United State | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
AI and ML
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
- Develop frameworks for
...
and monitoring AI
...
, including reasoning
...
, consistency,
...
, and fairness.
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.

Posted Jun 28, 2026

Work under the guidance and supervision of the Director, Enterprise Architecture to build supervised and unsupervised Artificial Intelligence (AI)/Machine Learning (ML) models

Research, analyze, support, and implement machine learning solutions on the Snowflake Cloud data warehouse platform using the Snowpark framework

Develop novel solutions using knowledge of the latest artificial intelligence/machine learning/natural language processing techniques and rigorous statistical analysis

Stay up-to-date with industry trends and advancements in artificial intelligence/machine learning

results.title: Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques including statistics, machine learning, simulation, and mathematical modelling
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and leadership to support data driven decision making
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...
### Required Qualifications:
...
- Bachelor’s Degree (preferably in information technology, engineering, math, computer science, analytics, engineering or other related field)
...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
...
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python
...
- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.
...
- Understanding of data, schema, data model, machine learning and how to bring efficiency in big data related life cycle
...
- Proven skills to create opportunities using machine learning or artificial intelligence
...
Optum, part of UnitedHealth
...
health solutions that connect millions to better care. Head
...
Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.

# Lead Scientist, Artificial Intelligence Research
...
, 2
...
The Senior Engineer, AI is responsible for building AI and Machine learning models and pipelines, with a focus on generative AI, LLMs and predictive modelling. The successful candidate will work closely with data scientists and product leads to implement AI models, build required data and code pipelines through rigorous engineering disciplines You should have expertise in the design, development, management, and maintenance of systems and handling of large datasets. You should have hands on experience with common machine learning and AI frameworks, and a good knowledge of AI and machine learning fundamentals (deep learning, regression, classification and clustering algorithms), retrieval augmented generation pipelines, as well as a good grasp of the design and evaluation of LLM-supported use cases.
...
- Coordinate between Data Scientists and Product Analysts
- Automate infrastructure used by the Data Science team
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced AI models and algorithms to solve complex business problems.
- Test and deploy models
- Develop minimum viable products based on machine learning
- Automate processes by utilizing machine learning
- Lead AI projects from conception to implementation, ensuring timely delivery and high-quality outcomes.
- Ability to create AI models utilizing deep learning, neural networks, and ML algorithms to derive business insights and fuel informed decision-making
...
- Advanced experience in programming, software engineering, and data science fields
...
- Mentor and coach junior associates on the team
- Ability to utilize various tools and methods to process data as well as create and keep up AI systems
...
- Communicate findings and recommendations to stakeholders through clear and compelling data visualizations and presentations.
...
- 5+ years of practical experience as an engineer with focus on implementation of AI / ML machine learning solutions.
- Masters in Computer Science / Machine Learning / AI, or related work experience with the design, building and evaluation of Machine Learning systems.
...
- 3+ years' experience with Machine Learning ecosystem tools, including pytorch/tensorflow, scikit-learn, xgboost or equivalents.
...
- Advanced knowledge of MLOps fundamentals, including orchestration tools, cloud compute, and observability tools.
...
- Advanced understanding of cloud platforms e.g. Azure / GCP / AWS and their AI tool set
...
- Practical experience working with data and code pipelines
- Ability to work independently with limited supervision
- Ability to implement, test and deploy Machine Learning models.
...
- Advanced experience with langchain / llamaindex / haystack / Azure AI studio, vector databases and retrieval techniques, or equivalent common tools in the emerging LLM-enable tech stack is a plus.
...
- Skilled in accessing and handling databases via SQL, Azure Data Factory or similar.
...
- Alternatively, familiarity with data storage/management systems or Big Data framework (like Hadoop, Spark) expected to be known or used. Advanced knowledge in Software Development best practices such as Continuous Integration, Unit/Integration Testing, Code Reviews.

results.title: Director of Data Analytics & Artificial Intelligence (AI) Solutions | Jobflarely
highlights:
Director of Data Analytics & Artificial Intelligence (AI) Solutions | Jobflarely
...
# Director of Data Analytics & Artificial Intelligence (AI) Solutions
...
Job Description SummaryWe are seeking a dynamic, forward-thinking and results-driven Director of Data Analytics and Artificial Intelligence to lead our artificial intelligence and machine learning strategy, execution, and team development. Reporting to the CTO, this role will define the direction of AI/ML initiatives, ensuring the development of scalable, high-performance AI solutions that drive innovation and create business value. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background, experience leading AI/ML teams, and the ability to align AI strategies with business objectives. If you are passionate about leveraging AI to transform industries and motivated by the challenge of pushing technological boundaries, we invite you to apply and be part of our journey to redefine what's possible in energy.
...
- Develop and execute Grid Automation’s AI/ML strategy, aligning it with business goals to drive differentiation, efficiency, and growth
...
- Build, mentor, and lead a diverse team of data scientists, machine learning engineers, and AI specialists, fostering a collaborative environment that promotes innovation and knowledge sharing
...
- Act as the thought leader for AI/ML technology, staying up-to-date with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices
...
- Drive innovation in AI methodologies, including deep learning, reinforcement learning, natural language processing (NLP), and computer vision
...
- Oversee the design of robust machine learning pipelines and data workflows, ensuring seamless data ingestion, processing, and model deployment
...
- Ensure that AI/ML solutions are scalable, efficient, and integrate seamlessly with existing systems and data infrastructure
...
- Define and track key performance indicators (KPIs) for AI/ML models ensuring that solutions deliver business value and meet performance expectations
...
- Monitor, maintain, and optimize deployed AI/ML models, ensuring continuous improvements in model accuracy and performance
...
- Stay informed of regulatory requirements around data privacy, security, and ethics, ensuring that AI/ML solutions comply with all relevant standards and laws
...
- Collaborate with product managers, engineering teams, and other functions to identify opportunities and define project scope, timelines, and deliverables for AI/ML projects
...
- Foster an environment of continuous learning, encouraging the team to experiment with new algorithms, frameworks, and methodologies
...
- Qualifications:
...
- Master’s/PhD Degree in computer science, electrical engineering, or electric power engineering
- 10+ years of experience in AI/ML, including unsupervised learning, supervised learning, and reinforcement learning, large language models (LLMs)
- Proven experience in developing, deploying, and scaling machine learning and AI models in production environments
...
- Strong expertise in algorithms, machine learning frameworks (e.g. TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn), and data processing tools
- Extensive knowledge of machine learning algorithms, deep learning, reinforcement learning, NLP, and computer vision
...
- Knowledge of ethical AI principles and data privacy regulations
...
- Advanced experience in utilizing and applying common programming languages, such as Python, C/C++, Java, Spark and Hadoop, R Programming, Kafka, C#, MATLAB, along with good familiarity with power system modeling and data communication format.
...
- Experience with microservices architecture, containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes), and cloud computing platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud)
...
- Expertise in GraphDB, SQL/NoSQL, MS Access, databases
...
- Knowledge of industrial automation or power system design
...
- Published research or contributions to open-source AI/ML projects

The team supports AI and digital modernization for both internal use and for external clients, with applications from intelligence analysis to manufacturing optimization.
